steps: Prepare a local QA staging folder outside the release path.
Copy extension files from browser-extension/onebrain-chrome-lab into the staging folder.
Copy manifest.public.json into the staging folder as manifest.json.
Verify staged manifest.json is valid JSON.
Verify staged host_permissions do not include http://*/* or https://*/*.
Confirm visible name NODAL OS Public Candidate.
Record load errors if any, without secrets or long raw logs.
